# microX
[简体中文](README.md)

![latest_version](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-v2.5.13-f39c12?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,&amp;logoColor=white&amp;style=flat "latest version")

## Project Background

A fully controllable private status feed.

## Project Features

- No database, entirely file-level writing
- Simple `Markdown` syntax support
- Draft auto-saved
- Media support: Text, images, multiple images, video, audio
- Post types: Regular, Private, Story, NSFW, Dev Log
- Post operations: Publish, edit, delete, archive
- Frontend visibility modes: Public, temporary links only, strictly private
- Image layout: Single image, multiple images, thumbnails
- Video support: Local `mp4`, remote `m3u8`
- Sync translation to `X.com`
- Original and translation
- Media file management: Upload, preview, delete, rename, play
- Search
- Single page configuration for all keys and obfuscation variables

### Companion Linux Scripts

- Statistics for total Tweets and their types (videos require manual modification)
- Update access keys
- Backup source code and update backup status in `info.html`

### Unsupported Features

- Admin-only (single account) login
- Comments
- Likes
- Reposts
- Multi-user
